description: Account of the qodesh, ca. 1120. Revenue from different people is listed, mostly without specifications. The sums seem to represent money of the qodesh deposited with different parnasim. Sums of rent from the compound of al-Masasa, apparently "the compound of the Jerusalemites," are explicitly mentioned, and also from "the compound of the orphan girl," mentioned in T-S NS J292 verso. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 242 #43)
tags: orphan, account, heqdesh, waqf, qodesh, 12th c
description_he: חשבון הקדש, כ-1120. הכנסות מכמה גורמים, כולל מ'מתחם המסאסה' (מתחם הירושלמים) ו'מתחם היתומה'.
